def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Step 1: Compute adv180 = 180-day average daily volume (time-series, materialised)
    df = df.with_columns(
        ts_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=180).alias('_adv180')
    )

    # Step 2: Compute time-series components and materialise them
    # (a) vwap - ts_min(vwap, ~16)
    # (b) correlation(vwap, adv180, ~18)
    df = df.with_columns(
        (pl.col('vwap') - ts_min(pl.col('vwap'), window=16)).alias('_diff_vwap'),
        correlation(pl.col('vwap'), pl.col('_adv180'), window=18).alias('_corr_vwap_adv')
    )

    # Step 3: Cross-sectional ranks per date on the materialised columns
    rank_diff = rank(pl.col('_diff_vwap')).over('date')
    rank_corr = rank(pl.col('_corr_vwap_adv')).over('date')

    # Step 4: Compare the two ranks; cast boolean to float (1.0 / 0.0)
    factor = (rank_diff < rank_corr).cast(pl.Float64)

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
